campaign: J-DATA-RESEARCH-MASTER-PLAN.md angles C1 (VIX regime), C2 (trend/range day), C3 (year/regime transfer)
scripts: backtest/autoresearch/j_regime_split.py (his data DEFINES the regime split)
backtest/autoresearch/j_regime_forward_validate.py (OUR 2025-26 OPRA fills VALIDATE the gate forward)

inputs.j_vix_daily: analysis/webull-j-trades/vix_daily_2021_2023.json (^VIX daily via yfinance; open=causal 09:30 proxy, change_1d=overnight)
inputs.fills: lib.simulator_real.simulate_trade_real (real OPRA, causal next-bar-open entry, v15 exit stack); VWAP-continuation detector reused verbatim from infinite_ammo_discovery.detect_vwap_pullback

method_anti_overfit: His data DEFINES each regime hypothesis + the threshold to try. OUR fills VALIDATE forward: chronological IS/OOS (cut 2026-02-02), 4 contiguous sub-windows (all-positive = bimodality killed), each candidate gate's OWN OOS (threshold derived IS-only, applied unseen OOS), DSR (n_trials=30), drop-top5 robustness, both-sides-positive. A gate tuned on a known-bad window with no clean own-OOS is DEAD.
honesty_note: J's raw SPX-family book is net NEGATIVE (-$12,885, WR 46.9%, PF 0.75). We locate WHERE the edge is least-bad / positive, NOT claim his book is profitable. Day-type labels on his trades are post-hoc descriptive (where his edge appeared); the forward gate uses only look-ahead-safe features.

C1_vix_regime.headline: A VIX *level* gate does NOT discriminate J's winners from losers (winner mean VIX 24.65 vs loser 25.01 — identical) and does NOT fix VWAP-continuation forward (every VIX band stays bimodal). BUT the inverse of a naive low-VIX gate DOES: a realized-VOLATILITY FLOOR (rvol >= 9 bps) lifts VWAP-continuation to all-sub-windows-positive with a clean own-OOS on the scorecard exit config. WATCH (not SHIP) on n=31 sample-thinness + exit-config sensitivity + needs a new live feature.

vix_level_winners_vs_losers.interpretation: VIX level barely separates outcomes; the band signal is driven by sample mix not a per-trade VIX edge (L154/L167 — a level anomaly != a per-trade option edge).

forward_validation_on_our_vwap_continuat.question: Does a VIX gate lift VWAP-continuation 6/7 -> 7/7 (all sub-windows OOS-positive) on our OPRA fills, with the gate's OWN OOS clean?
forward_validation_on_our_vwap_continuat.vix_gate_answer: NO. Prior sweep (vwap-trend-pullback-regime-gate.json) already found 0 winners across one-sided vix_lt_X / vix_falling / ADX / range_ratio / rvol-ceiling. The bad months (2025-07..10) were LOW-VIX (median 16.7) / low-realized-vol (6.1bps) / low-morning-move — the OPPOSITE of a low-VIX gate. Confirmed here: every two-sided VIX band (16-19,15-20,16-22,14-19) stays all_sub_windows_positive=False.
forward_validation_on_our_vwap_continuat.realized_vol_floor_answer: YES on the scorecard exit config. rvol >= 9 bps:

own_oos.verdict: generalizes — threshold derived IS-only, applied unseen OOS, still all-sub-positive

rvol_ge_9_live_chart_stop_only_minus99.note: On the LIVE chart-stop config one sub-window is negative (config-sensitivity, C29/L149: exit knobs don't transfer across stop configs). Combo rvol_ge_6_and_vix_lt_22 IS all-sub-positive on chart-stop (n=43) but has one side slightly negative.

forward_validation_on_our_vwap_continuat.mechanism: The rvol>=9 floor removes 88% of the dead-summer (2025-07..10) bad-month trades (their median rvol was 6.2 vs floor 9). It is filtering the structural quiet-tape feature the bad months shared — NOT curve-fit to dates. Surviving 31 trades median +$41.4 (not outlier-driven).

exact_param_if_shippable.definition: stdev of session 5m close-to-close log-returns from open to current bar, in bps; require >= 9.0 at trigger to take the VWAP-continuation entry
ship_blockers: n=31 < project winner bar of 35 (clears advisory evidence_n>=15, not the stricter 35)
all-sub-positive holds on -8pct exit config but NOT on the live chart-stop config
realized-vol is NOT currently computed live (no rvol in loop-state / vwap watcher) — needs a small new live feature before it can gate the live engine
exact_param_if_shippable.recommendation: WATCH: wire dormant (default-off param) + start logging realized_vol_bps at each VWAP-continuation trigger live; promote to SHIP once N>=35 accumulates live AND it holds on the chart-stop config J actually trades.

C2_trend_vs_range_day.headline: STRONGEST, most robust J finding: his edge is monotonic in day-type — TREND days breakeven (-$1.38/t WR 51.7%), CHOP/range days catastrophic (-$56.43/t WR 43.5%). His one genuinely-positive decent-N cell is bull/trend (+$13.28/t, PF 1.30, n=116). BUT the day-type/trend-strength signal does NOT transfer to our VWAP-continuation forward (ADX gates are among the WORST: adx_ge_20 = -$13.99). Day-type is real on J's data, un-validated as a live gate on ours.

j_data_finding.classifier: data-driven range_ratio terciles over reliable days (>=60 cached RTH 5m bars): trend = low path/net tercile (rr<=6.07, efficient move), range = high tercile (rr>=12.45, chop), mixed = middle.

bear/range.note: worst cell in the entire book

forward_validation_on_our_data.question: Does a trend-day / not-chop gate lift VWAP-continuation forward?
forward_validation_on_our_data.answer: NO. ADX/trend-strength and range-ratio gates were swept (vwap-trend-pullback-regime-gate.json) and are among the worst: adx_ge_20 exp -$13.99, adx_ge_25 -$20.70; range_ratio_le_2.0 oos_sign_stable=False. None make all sub-windows positive. The best trend-family proxy (morning_move_ge_0.003) reaches +$120 OOS but stays bimodal.
forward_validation_on_our_data.interpretation: VWAP-continuation already selects for a directional pullback context; the bad period was a low-VOLATILITY artifact, not a chop-vs-trend artifact. The volatility FLOOR (C1) captures the live-tradeable version of 'avoid dead days'; ADX does not.

C2_trend_vs_range_day.router_recommendation: WATCH as a J-behavioral insight (his chop-day losses are the bleed; a 'skip chop' discipline would have helped HIM). Do NOT build a day-type router for our engine off this — it does not validate forward on our setup. The volatility floor (C1) is the live-actionable cousin.

C3_year_regime_transfer.headline: J's book is 85% concentrated in 2022 (the bear year) by trade count, so his data is overwhelmingly ONE macro regime — limited cross-regime evidence. The one stable cross-year pattern: his BULL side is consistently less-bad than his BEAR side in EVERY year. This is a mild transfer-risk flag for our gap-and-go (LIVE PUT-only/bearish): J's own history corroborates a BULLISH lean, not a bearish edge.

2022.note: 85% of his book — the bear year

2023.note: higher WR but worse exp (bigger losses)

j_data_finding.cross_year_pattern: bull-side less-bad than bear-side in ALL years (2022: -4 vs -30; 2023: -9.6 vs -72.6). VIX-high band negative in all 3 years (sign-stable bleed). VIX-mid positive only in 2023 (not transferable).

transfer_risk_verdict_on_our_book.gap_and_go_LIVE_put_only: MILD FLAG. Validated on OUR fills independently (that stands), but J's own multi-year history does NOT corroborate a bearish edge — his bear side is his worst cross-regime. Treat gap-and-go's bear edge as our-data-specific, not J-corroborated. Keep BASE size; do not scale on the assumption J's history backs it.
transfer_risk_verdict_on_our_book.vwap_continuation: CORROBORATED on side asymmetry. J's bull-side > bear-side matches our forward finding (VWAP-cont C-side +$51.79 > P-side +$37.49 in vwap-trend-pullback-LIVE.json). The bull lean is the cross-regime-stable read.
transfer_risk_verdict_on_our_book.general: J's data cannot validate cross-regime robustness (it is ~1 regime). Our 2025-26 forward tests remain the authority for regime-transfer; J's data is a directional-bias corroborator only.

campaign_summary.highest_value_result: A realized-volatility FLOOR (rvol >= 9 bps) — motivated by J's C1 (dead-tail bleed) + the VWAP bad-month diagnosis (low-vol summer) — lifts VWAP-continuation to all-sub-windows-positive with a clean own-OOS on the scorecard exit config (the bimodality-killer the prior VIX sweep could not find). WATCH-grade: n=31, config-sensitive, needs a new live rvol feature.
campaign_summary.vix_level_gate: DEAD for fixing VWAP-continuation (level does not discriminate; confirmed bimodal across all bands).
campaign_summary.day_type_router: DEAD as a live gate on our data (does not transfer); real as a J-behavioral bleed insight (chop-day losses).
campaign_summary.transfer_risk: J's data is ~1 regime (85% 2022 bear); usable only as a bull-lean corroborator. Mild flag on gap-and-go's bear-only stance.
campaign_summary.next_step_if_pursued: Wire vwap_continuation_realized_vol_floor_bps dormant (default-off) + log realized_vol_bps at every live VWAP-continuation trigger; revisit for SHIP once N>=35 live and it holds on the chart-stop config.
